criteria.label: Voice & Style
criteria.description: Distinctive author voice. Appropriate and consistent style for the genre. Word choice enhances meaning.

criteria.label: Character Development
criteria.description: Well-developed, believable characters. Clear motivations and growth. Effective dialogue.

criteria.label: Plot & Structure
criteria.description: Engaging plot with clear conflict and resolution. Effective pacing. Logical story progression.

criteria.label: Setting & Description
criteria.description: Vivid, sensory details that bring the world to life. Setting supports the story.

criteria.label: Technical Execution
criteria.description: Grammar, spelling, and punctuation support readability. Shows attention to craft.
